description: Seed anchor for KRISTEN_MOORE_01 year-end financial reconciliation. Single-turn read-and-report task with no mid-run mutations; all 6 cross-source conflicts (C1 Loretta care QuickBooks-vs-Plaid-vs-Xero, C2 403(b) rate BambooHR-stale-vs-Gusto-live, C3 Fidelity 529 memory-vs-Plaid, C4 tithing Stripe-vs-QuickBooks-vs-church-statement, C5 D.C. savings QuickBooks-earmark-vs-Plaid-transfers, C6 latanoprost 8-week-cycle-vs-11-week-Plaid-gap) are baseline-resident in the mock APIs and persona-owned artifacts at session start.
